calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Jan-04-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CLEVELAND WRECKING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 430.41, which requires pre-demurrer meet-and-confer efforts to be "in person or by telephone."

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
